data.title: Federal Signal Corp to acquire Scranton Manufacturing Co Inc d/b/a New Way Trucks, expanding into refuse collection vehicles. Sept. 24, 2025.
data.description: On September 24, 2025, the Downers Grove-based company Federal Signal Corporation (NYSE: FSS) disclosed that they have entered into a definitive contract to purchase Scranton Manufacturing Company Inc., also known as...

data.title: Richmond American to offer sneak peek of Hevostila Estates in Eagle, Idaho. Opening in November, preview event on Sept. 24.
data.description: In preparation for its November opening, Hevostila Estates is set to hold a preview event on Saturday in Eagle, Idaho. Richmond American Homes of Idaho, Inc., a Sekisui House U.S., Inc. subsidiary, shared news of this special preview. This culminating event is an opportunity for prospective buyers to explore the offerings of the estate.
Macron and Zelenskyy hold bilateral meeting

data.title: UniQure's stock surged nearly 250% as their gene therapy showed success in treating Huntington's disease.
data.description: UniQure saw a significant surge in stock value on Wednesday following the announcement that their experimental gene therapy effectively treated Huntington's disease. The news led to a remarkable increase of nearly 250% in UniQure's stock price, sparking optimism about a potential cure for the disease.

data.title: Analyst recommends buying 3 bitcoin miners due to high AI demand.
data.description: An analyst at Arete has started coverage on three bitcoin miners with a buy rating. The analyst highlighted the strong demand for artificial intelligence as a driving factor. This move was made public on Wednesday.

data.title: Acadia Pharma shares plummet after rare disease drug fails; Soleno stock surges.
data.description: Acadia Pharmaceuticals saw a significant decrease in its stock value on Wednesday following the unsuccessful results of its experimental treatment for a rare genetic disorder. The company's shares tumbled by a substantial margin on this news. Conversely, Soleno shares experienced a surge amidst these developments.

data.title: Richmond American Homes opens new Las Vegas community, Archer Park at Mountain's Edge, offering 3 floor plans.
data.description: Richmond American Homes of Nevada, Inc., a subsidiary of Sekisui House U.S., Inc., has introduced the grand opening of Archer Park at Mountain's Edge in Las Vegas. This new residential community offers three meticulously planned floor plans. The unveiling took place on September 24, 2025.

data.title: Walker & Dunlop secures $156M financing for a five-property Southeast US portfolio with 1,351 units.
data.description: In Bethesda, Maryland, Walker & Dunlop, Inc. revealed securing $156,621,000 to fund five multifamily properties across the Southeast and Texas. These transactions, finalized this year, encompass 1,351 units within four Southeast properties and one in Texas. Facilitated by Allan Edelson and Joe Tarantino of Walker & Dunlop Multifamily Finance, the financing was orchestrated for Boston Capital Real Estate, a valued long-time client.

data.title: AZ Vitality & Wellness in Peoria offers brain stimulation device for depression treatment. Launch party on Oct 23.
data.description: A launch party is set to take place on October 23 in Peoria, Arizona, to introduce a new treatment for depression and anxiety. This innovative technology is now offered at AZ Vitality and Wellness in the mentioned location. This news was announced on September 24, 2025. The event aims to showcase the new treatment to individuals struggling with these mental health conditions.

data.title: Navajo Transitional Energy Co. pays record dividend of $3.15 million to Navajo Nation, reflecting strong financial performance.
data.description: In Farmington, New Mexico, Navajo Transitional Energy Company (NTEC) has announced an annual dividend payout of $3,150,000 to its sole shareholder, the Navajo Nation. This significant dividend marks the largest ever issued by NTEC. The amount is determined by NTEC's comprehensive financial results, which encompass its operations within the Navajo Nation, Wyoming, and Montana. This dividend showcases NTEC's robust financial performance. In addition to this dividend, NTEC has contributed over $128 million towards economic development.

data.title: Stingray renews normal course issuer bid, approved to repurchase up to 3,710,428 Subordinate Shares, around 10% of public float.
data.description: Stingray Group Inc., a leading company in music and video content distribution, business services, and advertising solutions, has received approval from the Toronto Stock Exchange for the renewal of its normal course issuer bid. This allows Stingray to buy back a total of 3,710,428 subordinate voting shares and variable subordinate voting shares, which is roughly 10% of the public float of Subordinate Shares as of September 15, 2025. The company's stock is traded under the tickers RAY.A and RAY.B on the TSX.

data.title: Quantum Computing Inc. raises $500 million in oversubscribed private placement, totaling $850 million cash position.
data.description: A group of significant current shareholders, in addition to an initial investment from a renowned global alternative asset manager, spearheaded the recent offering. As a result of this, the company now holds a total cash balance of around $850 million post-closure. This development took place on September 24, 2025, in Hoboken, New Jersey through Quantum Computing Inc.

data.title: Morse Micro and Browan Communications partner to accelerate Wi-Fi HaLow market adoption at The Things Conference in Amsterdam on Sept. 24, 2025.
data.description: In Amsterdam on September 24, 2025, Morse Micro, a top provider of Wi-Fi HaLow silicon solutions, unveiled a technology collaboration with Browan Communications. This partnership aims to boost the global acceptance of Wi-Fi HaLow™. This new venture brings together the expertise of both companies to promote the advancement of this technology.

data.title: Extra Space Storage Inc. will discuss 3rd Quarter 2025 results on October 29, 2025, after the market closes.
data.description: On September 24, 2025, in Salt Lake City, Extra Space Storage Inc. (NYSE: EXR) revealed plans to disclose its financial performance for the third quarter and first nine months of 2025 on October 29, 2025. The report will cover the period ending September 30, 2025, and will be released after the market closes. The Company is scheduled to conduct a related event following the announcement.

data.title: Jimmy Kimmel's comeback episode after suspension attracted 6.2 million viewers, quadrupling the show's usual audience.
data.description: The most recent episode of "Jimmy Kimmel Live!" following its suspension by Disney last week saw nearly four times the usual viewership.

data.title: RippleMatch launches AI-Talent Marketplace in NYC, replacing resumes with verified skills for early-career hiring.
data.description: RippleMatch has just unveiled its AI-Talent Marketplace in New York, aiming to revolutionize early-career hiring processes. Instead of traditional resumes, the platform focuses on verified skills to streamline and enhance recruitment efforts. This innovative approach is set to accelerate and improve the hiring process, promising a more efficient and effective way to connect talent with opportunities.

data.title: Siemens enhances DBO™ by adding natural hazard risk mitigation. Helps US businesses assess building resilience against 20+ hazards.
data.description: Siemens, based in Iselin, N.J., is enhancing its free web-based Digital Business Optimizer (DBO™) platform by introducing a new natural hazard risk mitigation feature. This collaboration with academic partners has resulted in a tool that enables US businesses to evaluate and compare the resilience of their structures and sites against more than 20 location-specific natural hazards including floods, wildfires, earthquakes, hurricanes, and others. This feature assists in analyzing and improving risk management strategies, aiding in the protection of buildings and facilities.
